title: Better Than Programmer Art
description: A texture pack for the mod Better Than Adventure! that makes the textures fit modern Minecraft.
body:
This is a texture pack for the beta 1.7 mod  [Better Than Adventure!](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/) that updates almost all textures to be more in line with the modern Minecraft textures made by Jappa.

**Items**, **blocks**, **entities** and some **GUI** elements have all been updated for a smoother, modern experience.

Some textures are backports from modern Minecraft by Jappa but there is also new textures made by me for the items and blocks added by the mod.

This pack is made for the mod [Better Than Adventure!](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/) and will not work in vanilla Minecraft.

![An interior view of a cozy house. The walls are made out of pink and white planks along with glass windows looking out to a green forest. inside the house are colourful chests, a variety of furnaces and blast furnaces, a crafting table and a placed pumpkin pie. The player is holding a piece of bread and in their hotbar are steel tools and weapons along with torches.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b1c5a59efcb8fbc775c24e4ad2404b14d95cd7d.png)

![Interior of a shallow cave, with the exit being visible in the distance, light pouring in and some trees and grass are visible. In the cave, the player is battling two skeletons. Two torches light the cave. The player is holding a bow with golden arrows inside, preparing to fight.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c5a86606be9012537c373e53922fe2941d33e63.png)
